create.description: Create new Blueprint with components, variables, and graph logic

modify.description: Modify an existing Blueprint — search, read, then write

fix_wiring.description: Fix wiring after partial plan failure using pin_manifests from the result

variables_components.description: Add variables and components with correct type format and configuration

edit_existing_graph.description: Insert, remove, or rewire nodes in an existing event graph or function graph

multi_asset.description: Create multiple related Blueprints (e.g. gun + bullet, spawner + enemy) with iteration budgeting
